diagrams.title: 2:1 Multiplexer Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows 2 data inputs (I0,I1), 1 select line (S), and 1 output (Y). When S=0, I0 passes to output; when S=1, I1 passes to output.
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic MUX operation and selection mechanism

diagrams.title: 4:1 Multiplexer Truth Table
diagrams.description: Complete truth table showing relationship between select lines S1,S0 and output Y for all 4 input combinations.
diagrams.purpose: Learning how select lines address specific inputs and determine output

diagrams.title: 4:1 MUX Gate-Level Circuit
diagrams.description: Circuit implementation using 4 AND gates, 2 NOT gates, and 1 OR gate showing how each input is enabled based on select line combination.
elements: AND gates for each input path
NOT gates for select line complements
OR gate to combine enabled paths
diagrams.purpose: Understanding hardware implementation and boolean expression realization

diagrams.title: Cascaded MUX for 8:1 Implementation
diagrams.description: Two 4:1 MUXes cascaded with one 2:1 MUX to create an 8:1 MUX showing hierarchical design approach.
elements: First stage: Two 4:1 MUXes handling inputs 0-3 and 4-7
Second stage: 2:1 MUX selecting between first stage outputs
Select lines S2,S1,S0 distributed across stages
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to build larger MUX from smaller ones using cascading
